utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check each for full specification with costs: 1) health_coverage: explicitly includes physical and mental health insurance with specific plans, costs, and totals—meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with plan, cost, coverage limit, and details—meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with plan and cost—meets requirement. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with costs—meets requirement. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown and additional details—meets requirement. All items are fully specified with costs.
